overall.description: Game engine footage from a space exploration game showing an armored character traversing a rocky alien landscape, transitioning from third-person to first-person perspective, and ending with a spaceship in orbit above the planet. The environment features barren crystalline terrain under a bright sun with deep blue atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky alien hillside with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily across rocky terrain, surveying the alien landscape

entered.detail: massive gray rock outcrop immediately to the right of the path
numerous dark rocks strewn across the barren landscape
rolling hills and mountain silhouettes on the horizon
intense white sun in the blue sky creating harsh shadows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an armored character walking across a barren alien landscape. A large rock formation dominates the right side while scattered rocks and distant mountains fill the horizon under a bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien surface with crystalline rock formations

events.description: camera perspective switches from third-person to first-person view

agents.ego_description: navigating cautiously through the rocky alien terrain in first-person perspective

entered.detail: dark jagged crystalline formations rising from the ground
dark jagged crystalline formations silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to first-person as the player moves through a field of dark crystalline rock spires. The terrain remains barren and rocky with the sun now positioned to the right, casting long shadows across the alien surface.

events.description: scene transitions from planetary surface to space showing spaceship in orbit

agents.ego_description: piloting a spaceship in low orbit above the planet surface

entered.detail: curved horizon of the planet below with blue atmospheric glow
thin blue line of atmosphere along the planet's curve
distant stars visible in the blackness of space

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly transitions to space, showing the spaceship from behind as it orbits the planet. The curved planet surface stretches below with a thin blue atmospheric glow, while the bright sun hangs in the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a grounded trek across a barren alien surface to a wide orbital view of the planet from space. It begins with a third-person perspective of an armored character walking past a large rock formation toward distant mountains under a bright sun. As the camera shifts into a first-person view, the movement continues through a field of dark crystalline rock spires that cast long shadows across the rocky terrain. The scene then abruptly expands upward, leaving the surface behind to reveal a spaceship orbiting the planet from behind. Finally, the view settles on the curved horizon of the world below, framed by a thin blue atmospheric glow and the brilliant sun centered in the void.
